name: J1939ILBlockRxMessage
title: J1939ILBlockRxMessage
syntax: long J1939ILBlockRxMessage(dword pgn, dword sourceAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue); // form 1
description: Prevents processing of a received message by the interaction layer.
The message to block is specified by PGN, destination source address and a part of the first eight data bytes.
To revert this command you can use J1939ILResetBlockedRxMessage or J1939ILResetAllBlockedRxMessages.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: The message with this PGN shall be blocked.
